DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant ROSALIO MARTINEZ in propria persona demurring party (His wife Gloria Martinez present also)
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. of BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN 409-7611 for Plaintiff SIMON HOK LAI KONG opposing party
The Court adopted its tentative ruling -- defendant's demurrer overruled with 5 days leave to answer. Ms. Elizabeth Zaldivar, Deputy Clerk and an officer of the Court served as interpreter in translating the English language to the Spanish language and vice versa. Order signed in open court. (JJM/rc) Eric Throne, CSR 7855
